What entities are present on the countertop and what are their positions?
canonical_answer: A white and silver blender base sits on the left side of the marble countertop. A clear plastic cup containing white liquid and fruit rests near the base. A small glass container holding a brown substance is placed behind the blender. A white rectangular plate holds banana slices and a metal spoon. A large stainless steel refrigerator stands in the background.

question: Walk through the key visual changes observed from the start of the video until the final scene.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a green square shape is partially visible on the left edge; at 1s, the text 'eHcv' appears in the center with a 3D folded ribbon appearance; at 18s, a woman wearing a blue top appears standing in a modern kitchen; at 19s, various kitchen items including a white appliance and fruit plate become visible on the counter.

question: Describe the timeline of entities appearing on screen during the introductory and kitchen segments.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a green stylized text logo forms on a light gray background; at 2s, the intro sequence concludes with the full text visible; at 18s, a woman with long dark hair stands behind a kitchen island; at 20s, stainless steel appliances and white cabinets are clearly visible surrounding the woman in the room.
